name: Athens Market's Avgolemono Soup (Egg Lemon So
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chicken, water, and desired amount of salt in a heavy pot. Bring to boil.
2. Reduce heat and simmer for approximately 1 1/2 to 2 hours, skimming foam off top as necessary. Add more water if needed so you end up with 3 quarts of chicken stock. Remove the chicken and set aside for later use. Strain the chicken stock into a clean saucepan, reserving 3 cups.
3. Bring the stock in the saucepan to boil. Add the rice and bring back to boil. Reduce heat and simmer for 30 minutes or until the rice is soft.
4. In a large measuring cup, mix lemon juice with one cup of reserved chicken stock. Set aside.
5. In a large mixing bowl, beat eggs on high speed for 4 minutes. Reduce speed to medium and continue beating while slowly adding the lemon juice and stock mixture.
6. Slowly pour the egg and lemon mixture into the saucepan of rice and stock, stirring continually. Continue to stir for one minute as the soup cooks.
7. Remove from heat. Salt and pepper to taste. Serve hot.
NOTE: You can chop up the cooked chicken into small chunks and add it to the soup. Or use the chicken to make chicken salad, sandwiches, etc.
